title: Real WeChat export imported and launched in Developer Tools
notes: Import the packaged candidate's real wechatgame export into WeChat Developer Tools and capture startup/runtime evidence for the same revision. This is target-surface evidence for WeChat and cannot be replaced by H5 or Creator-only validation.
evidence: Imported wechatgame project path or package manifest reference

title: Physical-device WeChat runtime validated for this candidate
notes: Attach the smoke report and supporting captures from a physical-device or WeChat real-device-debugging runtime pass against the same candidate revision. Keep recordedAt fresh; stale runtime evidence must block the WeChat target surface.

title: WeChat runtime observability reviewed for this candidate
notes: Review the same-revision runtime observability evidence for the release environment and record any accepted follow-ups before sign-off. Required endpoint set: /api/runtime/health, /api/runtime/auth-readiness, /api/runtime/metrics.
evidence: summary of any non-blocking alerts or follow-ups

title: WeChat RC checklist and blockers reviewed
notes: Attach the completed release-surface checklist and blocker register for the same packaged candidate. Checklist, blockers, owner, recordedAt, revision, blockerIds, and any waiver metadata must all point at the same WeChat release decision.
